For talent

Find your dream job

Join our growing network of 4M+ users and advance your career in Web3

  • Access the best opportunities from top companies in Web3

For recruiters

Refer and earn real money

Monetize your network by helping fill open roles and introducing companies to Bondex

  • Gain immediate access to job opportunities with bounty rewards
  • Refer candidates and earn bounties if they get hired
  • Refer a company and earn a revenue share of their platform fees
Sign up

For companies

Access our talent network

Optimize your hiring with our crowdsourced recruitment

  • Reach the right talent and get in front of our 4M+ Web3 talent network
  • Hire faster and cheaper when you set your bounty reward and unleash recruiters to find the best candidates
  • Receive pre-vetted talent as we filter out the noise saving you time and helping you get top talent first
